prompt: This loop is supposed to sum the digits of a number but always returns 0. What is the bug?
choices: n % 10 does not extract the last digit correctly
sum = n % 10 replaces sum each iteration instead of accumulating; it should be sum += n % 10
n /= 10 should be n %= 10 to strip the digit
The while condition should be n >= 0 to include zero
explanation: sum = n % 10 overwrites sum with the current digit rather than adding to it. After the loop, sum holds only the last digit processed (the leading digit). Fix: sum += n % 10;
